name: Open Data Commons Attribution License v1.0

references.note: Canonical publication source maintained by Open Data Commons (Open Knowledge Foundation).

approvals.note: Not OSI-approved. ODC-By is a data license rather than a software license; it is not listed on OSI's approved-licenses list because its subject matter (databases and database rights) falls outside OSI's open-source software definition.
FSF does not classify data licenses on its free-software-licenses list. ODC-By is not listed under either free or non-free categories.
